<!-- Design language DL-07 SAGA token block -->

## Design language: SAGA (DL-07)

**Every report becomes history.** Nordic: History and continuity.

Status: candidate. Occasions: weekly digests, bulletins, newsletters, reading pages.

### Design laws

- Narrative hierarchy
- Time is explicit
- Trends over snapshots
- Headlines tell the story
- Archive-friendly formatting

### Constitution (deterministic communication contract)

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| narrative_style | story-first |
| density | operational |
| annotation_policy | guided |
| legend_policy | direct-labels-only |
| highlight_policy | single |
| decision_style | evidence-only |
| reading_time | minute |
| charts_per_page | 2 |

### Palette

| Role | Hex |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| ink | `#111111` |
| body | `#2E2E2E` |
| hairline | `#111111` |
| gridline | `#E4E4E4` |
| primary | `#C0182B` |
| muted | `#B0B0B0` |
| positive | `#2E2E2E` |
| negative | `#C0182B` |

### Fonts

- display: Georgia,serif, weight 700
- body: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400

### Chrome

kicker: false, eyebrow: false
